title: So I was bored and I have Photoshop
display_title: So I was bored and I have Photoshop
wikitext:
[]: So I was bored and I have Photoshop...             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Jun 12, 2013 6:21 am I've always loved this poster And I've always wanted it without the characters and text, so 2 hours of photoshopery later Anyway, there if you want it

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Wed Jun 12, 2013 3:06 pm Fine job. Come to think of it, this probably should've been the poster used for 3.0 [/snark].

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:18 pm BC Baron wrote: Come to think of it, this probably should've been the poster used for 3.0 [/snark].

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:21 pm BC Baron wrote: Fine job. Come to think of it, this probably should've been the poster used for 3.0 [/snark].

[]:             Quote Post by CX1329 » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:26 pm ElMariachi wrote: Not quite : I would make the ground and walls red, Shinji in a fetal position in the middle, Asuka glaring with a murderous look from the railing and Kaworu doing the same pose than in the 1.0 and 2.0 poster... but with the DSS Choker murder sticks circling his neck! And Mari... Mari would made the exact same pose, she don't need to change anything! Oh and everyone is wearing its plugsuit of course!

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:28 pm CX1329 wrote: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Slasher Flick Edition.

[]:             Quote Post by CX1329 » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:30 pm Stillborn wrote: Or guide how to treat a patient waking from coma.

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:30 pm Stillborn wrote: Or guide how to treat a patient waking from coma.

[]:             Quote Post by CX1329 » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:31 pm Katana wrote: [s]And have your hand covered in yogurt.[/s]

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:38 pm Nope. There is a difference. EoE shows treatment of patient IN coma. 3.0 treatment of someone who just woke up. Get you facts straight

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:44 pm Stillborn wrote: Nope. There is a difference. EoE shows treatment of patient IN coma. 3.0 treatment of someone who just woke up. Get you facts straight

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:54 pm Katana wrote: Which one shows the treatment of someone who's going to sleep now?

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:55 pm Stillborn wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jun 12, 2013 4:58 pm Katana wrote: This will help me to stay awake in the morning.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jun 12, 2013 11:50 pm tzigi wrote: I've been rather partial to this approach: Keeping only Shinji there proves how lost, unhappy and misunderstanded he feels.[/img]

[]:             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Thu Jun 13, 2013 4:17 am There's one thing everyone is overlooking. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jun 13, 2013 4:41 am Also, the OP's version has the shadow on the wall and window-frame behind Kensuke missing; the version with just Shinji shows how it should be correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jun 13, 2013 6:28 am Ringworm128 wrote: There's one thing everyone is overlooking. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Thu Jun 13, 2013 7:19 am pwhodges wrote: Also, the OP's version has the shadow on the wall and window-frame behind Kensuke missing; the version with just Shinji shows how it should be correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jun 13, 2013 8:00 am Hmm; on reflection I see there's a real problem either way. In the original, the problem is that there is no shadow on the wall to the left of the window, in spite of there being on on the window itself at that point. For consistency, I guess you should remove the shadow at the top of the window as well which at present is another inconsistency that make the change more apparent.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Wed Jun 12, 2013 3:06 pm Fine job. Come to think of it, this probably should&#3
